response.original_title: Los festejos del centenario de Ayacucho
response.overview: It contains: views of the dances at the Municipality of Lima and the Government Palace with the attendance of all the ambassadors; the great industrial and livestock exhibition; the reception of the ambassadors; the disembarkation of the President of Bolivia and Generalissimo Pershing; the inauguration of the Archbishop Loayza Hospital and the monument to Sucre; the Te Deum at the basilica and the parade of the Bolivian troops and cadets; the inauguration of the archaeological and Bolivarian museums; the centennial bullfight, with the attendance of the presidents of Peru and Bolivia; Belmonte's bullfighting feats; gala races at the Santa Beatriz racetrack; and the military parade at the racetrack.
response.title: Los festejos del centenario de Ayacucho
